title: spiraea glutinosa
intro: Spiraea glutinosa, also known as sticky meadowsweet, is a flowering plant species in the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Spiraea glutinosa include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Spiraea glutinosa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
